boundaries.cause: The alert has become the focal subject; a clean editorial reset reveals the organized diagnostic surface.
The highlighted release marker leaves the service map and lands on its matching incident-timeline anchor.
The connected evidence is complete, so the film changes register to a resting product statement.

cameraMoves.motivation: The exact linked release becomes the semantic focal subject and earns the film's one lens move.

interactions.observableStateChange: Selecting api-gateway changes the service map from neutral nodes to a highlighted dependency route and exposes the correlated deployment marker.
The release marker carries from the map handoff into the timeline and the deployment event becomes the highlighted cause candidate.

energyPeak.reason: Camera arrival, route ignition, and release docking converge in one readable causal gesture.

geometryPolicy.purpose: Measured match handoff between map release and timeline deployment anchor.
Measured cursor landing on the service-map interaction target.
Measured placement of the causal release marker at the timeline anchor.
